top_signals.title: Can AI drain DeFi? Separating Claude Mythos hype from reality
top_signals.summary: Claude Mythos has raised concerns about AI-driven attacks on DeFi protocols. However, the same AI tools are also available to security teams, not just attackers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: InvestEco Sustainable Food Fund IV Holds a Final Close With Total Commitments of C$106M
top_signals.summary: InvestEco Capital is pleased to announce the final close of the InvestEco Sustainable Food Fund IV. This fund will continue InvestEco’s work of investing in high-growth food companies that promote health and sustainability in the food sector. The Fund closed with total commitments of C$106M, the largest InvestEco fund to date. Investors include Farm Credit [...]
